allow: Bash(grep -r "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION.*affiliate\\|CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION.*seller\\|CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION.*commission" supabase/migrations/*.sql)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(t, indent=2\)\) for t in data['tables'] if 'document_request_uploads' in t['name']]")

Bash(mcp-supabase execute_sql --query "SELECT constraint_name, constraint_type, table_name FROM information_schema.table_constraints WHERE table_name = 'document_request_uploads' AND table_schema = 'public';")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); funcs=json.loads\(data[0]['text']\); [print\(f['slug'], '| verify_jwt:', f.get\('verify_jwt','?'\)\) for f in funcs if f['slug'] in ['verify-stripe-session-application-fee','verify-stripe-session-placement-fee','verify-stripe-session-selection-process-fee','verify-stripe-session-package-fee','verify-stripe-session-scholarship-fee','verify-stripe-session-i20-control-fee','verify-stripe-session-reinstatement-fee','notify-university-document-reupload','parcelow-webhook']]")
